name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.76: allow updating a machine model via PUT machines/:deviceCode. A machine registered before model support (e.g. the first gravity fridge) had no model and so received no fridge planogram block, and there was no endpoint to correct it. The update handler now accepts model and recomputes isKioskModel from it, persisting the change. Cumulative over v5.75.
